info.name: Space Weather Dashboard
info.summary: Real-time space weather monitoring with NOAA/NASA data
info.description:
Comprehensive dashboard for monitoring space weather conditions including: - Real-time KP index and geomagnetic storms - Solar flux (F10.7) measurements and charts - X-ray flux monitoring with alert levels - Aurora forecast predictions - HF band propagation conditions - D-RAP absorption maps - SDO solar imagery - Weather satellite image gallery
Data sources: - NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center (SWPC) - NASA APIs (Earth Imagery, Solar Dynamics Observatory) - HamQSL propagation data
info.author: Nextcloud Space Weather Project
Admin
